name: Finance Auto
description: Finance automation v1.0 RC — 90 REST routes + 1 WS, multi-org books, trial-balance import with 3-tier .xls parser, GAAP+CAS reports, multi-auditor RBAC, AI-assisted scenarios with consent dialog, encrypted backup + key rotation, peer benchmarks, notes auto-generation

description_i18n.zh: 财务自动化 v1.0 RC — 多账套管理 / 余额表导入 / 资产负债表 + 利润表 + 现金流报表自动生成 / 多审计师协作 / AI 三档敏感度 + 用户授权 / 加密备份 + 密钥轮换 / 同业 Peer 对比 / 附注自动生成（90 路由 + 1 WS）
description_i18n.en: Finance automation v1.0 RC — multi-org books, trial-balance import (3-tier .xls parser), automated GAAP+CAS reports, multi-auditor RBAC workflow, AI scenarios with consent dialog, encrypted backup + key rotation, peer benchmarks, automatic notes (90 routes + 1 WS)

author: OpenAkita
